source_scope: frozen 2024-2025 holdout replay, train-only walk-forward artifacts, forward-evidence scorecard CSV/JSON, current-evidence operator-boundary context, and method-family comparison context

evidence_boundary.valid_use: frozen 2024-2025 holdout, train-only walk-forward, method-family, and paper-lane posture comparison
non_goals: do not use the main comparison rebuild as settled ROI
do not promote OP_REFINED_K7 or Phase 8 from this artifact
do not reopen current odds-only XGBoost from this artifact
do not treat Harville benchmark-only output as a live approach
do not substitute BAQ for BEL
do not discuss real-money scaling from this artifact
do not quote current PAPER_TRADE_NOW instructions from this artifact; use the combined operator_status_context/source_freshness/operator_read_gate route from CURRENT_EVIDENCE_SUMMARY instead
do not treat the copied current-evidence operator snapshot as settled ROI or bet readiness

evidence_boundary_text: main-comparison render/sidecar only; source fingerprints, clean rebuilds, and validator passes are reproducibility metadata, not live paper-trade evidence, settled ROI, live profitability, promotion readiness, or real-money evidence; current top-card/operator routing belongs in CURRENT_EVIDENCE_SUMMARY.md / current_evidence_summary.json via the combined operator_status_context/source_freshness/operator_read_gate route

ranked_rows.label: Phase 7 OP/CD rule-component basket
ranked_rows.note: Frozen 3-rule baseline. BEL contributes zero 2024-2025 races, so the current holdout is effectively the OP+CD legs.
ranked_rows.secondary_basis: frozen replay on walk-forward test years

ranked_rows.label: Phase 8 frozen portfolio
ranked_rows.note: Frozen 7-rule Phase 8 basket. Useful as the headline multi-track challenger, but still full-history-mined before this replay.
ranked_rows.secondary_basis: frozen replay on walk-forward test years

ranked_rows.label: OP refined only
ranked_rows.note: Higher-ROI OP variant with a much smaller forward sample. Treat as selective, not as the new default.
ranked_rows.secondary_basis: frozen replay on walk-forward test years

ranked_rows.label: OP train-score switch
ranked_rows.note: Each year, pick the better-qualifying OP rule by train-only selection score. Recent picks: 2022=OP_DURABLE_K7, 2023=OP_DURABLE_K7, 2024=OP_REFINED_K7, 2025=OP_REFINED_K7.

ranked_rows.label: OP durable only
ranked_rows.note: Largest-sample OP anchor. Lower upside than the refined OP variant, but materially more forward races.
ranked_rows.secondary_basis: frozen replay on walk-forward test years

ranked_rows.label: Train-only yearly selector
ranked_rows.note: The current honest selector baseline from walk_forward_validation.py. Historical context includes the pre-existing BEL bridge candidate in some earlier folds, but no new aliasing is added here.

method_family_evidence_debt.still_missing: Future settled OP/CD paper rows with usable ROI coverage; `OP_REFINED_K7` also needs 20+ complete shadow rows before promotion review; 30+ same-candidate rows before anchor displacement; 100+ total ROI-complete observations before any real-money discussion
method_family_evidence_debt.invalid_shortcut: Treating old holdout/replay rows, clean scans, open signals, or a settlement-audit pass as posture-changing proof
method_family_evidence_debt.next_honest_action: Keep collecting and settling `OP_DURABLE_K7` + `CD_CORE_K8` observations; log `OP_REFINED_K7` as shadow-only until the explicit gates are met

method_family_evidence_debt.still_missing: Positive betting evidence on frozen holdout or train-only walk-forward terms, not just broad hit-rate/calibration context
method_family_evidence_debt.invalid_shortcut: Promoting from a 41.99% hit rate while the broad betting replay is -24.05% ROI
method_family_evidence_debt.next_honest_action: Keep Harville as a benchmark/calibration sanity check unless a future betting-evidence surface turns positive

method_family_evidence_debt.still_missing: A materially richer non-odds feature/data class, downstream betting pass-through improvement, and then settled paper observations
method_family_evidence_debt.invalid_shortcut: Reopening from another odds-only rerun, payout-RMSE gain, or model-fit-only downstream A/B result while betting ROI remains -24.16%
method_family_evidence_debt.next_honest_action: Keep the current odds-only XGBoost path parked; reopen only if the feature class changes and the betting pass-through improves before paper observation

ci_only_promotion_blockers: separate 20-row promotion-review and 30-row anchor-displacement paper-observation gates not cleared
op_challenger_diagnostic.ci_only_promotion_read: A positive bootstrap CI lower bound is useful support context, but it is not enough by itself to promote OP_REFINED_K7 or displace OP_DURABLE_K7; the challenger still has a smaller holdout sample, a losing holdout-year split, lower walk-forward recurrence, and no ROI-complete paper observations clearing the separate promotion or anchor-review gates.

required_before_review.phase8_promotion_review: 20+ ROI-complete candidate shadow observations plus cleaner split-aware/walk-forward support
required_before_review.anchor_displacement: 30+ ROI-complete same-candidate paper observations plus a cleaner split-aware forward read and equal-or-better walk-forward support

does_not_count: positive bootstrap CI lower bound by itself

phase8_promotion_review.observation_scope: future settled shadow ledger rows for the same candidate with complete ROI coverage
phase8_promotion_review.gate_role: opens promotion-review discussion only; does not displace OP_DURABLE_K7 as anchor by itself
also_requires: cleaner split-aware forward read than the current anchor/companion pair
cleaner walk-forward/frozen-standard support than the current anchor/companion pair

anchor_displacement.observation_scope: future settled same-candidate paper ledger rows with complete ROI coverage
anchor_displacement.gate_role: minimum before any discussion of replacing OP_DURABLE_K7 as safest anchor
also_requires: cleaner split-aware forward read than OP_DURABLE_K7
walk-forward/frozen-standard support that clearly beats OP_DURABLE_K7's larger sample

real_money_discussion.observation_scope: settled paper-trade ledger observations with usable return/cost coverage
real_money_discussion.gate_role: minimum before any real-money confidence or bankroll discussion
also_requires: hit-rate and ROI inside the expected range

scorecard_ranking_contract.known_rank_override: CD_CORE_K8 ranks ahead of OP_REFINED_K7 because PAPER tier outranks WATCH tier even though OP_REFINED_K7 has the higher raw forward_trust score.
scorecard_ranking_contract.why: The scorecard rank is a conservative decision/posture order; tier gates protect against small-sample and mixed-year spikes outrunning the safer OP anchor or primary OP/CD paper-basket companion.

scorecard_ranking_contract_read: rank is tier-first conservative decision order; raw forward_trust/Score is evidence support inside posture, not an automatic promotion queue

decision_gate_progress.valid_use: machine-readable current gate progress for report routing and no-overclaim checks

primary_first_read.read: Primary first-read gate: 6/30 ROI-complete primary rows; 24 more needed.

op_anchor_same_candidate_review.read: OP-anchor settlement gap: OP_DURABLE_K7 has 0 ROI-complete settled row(s); CD_CORE_K8 has 6. Need 30 more OP_DURABLE_K7 ROI-complete row(s) before the 30-row same-candidate anchor-review floor is even count-complete. CD companion rows do not reduce that OP-anchor gap.

phase8_promotion_review.read: Phase 8 promotion-review gate: weakest current shadow coverage is 0/20 for OP_REFINED_K7, AQU_K9, SA_K9, KEE_K9, DMR_FALL_K7; the floor is per candidate and is not a promotion entitlement.

real_money_discussion.read: Real-money discussion floor: primary bridge currently has 6/100 ROI-complete rows, before concentration, payout-distribution, positive-ROI, and no-BAQ-as-BEL prerequisites.

decision_gate_progress.read: Gate progress: primary first-read 6/30; OP anchor same-candidate 0/30; Phase 8 weakest shadow 0/20; real-money discussion floor 6/100. All remain uncleared and are routing context only.

operator_read_gate.read: Saved top card can be read as current operator routing context with `python3 paper_trade_lane_monitor.py --signals-ledger paper_trades/phase7_current_paper_paper_trade_signals.csv --recommendation-ledger paper_trades/phase7_current_paper_paper_trade_recommendations.csv --settlement-ledger paper_trades/phase7_current_paper_paper_trade_settlements.csv --rules phase7_current_paper_rules.json`, but it is still not settled ROI, promotion readiness, live-profitability, bankroll, or real-money evidence.

scorecard_audit_route.route_read: Use `SCORECARD_RANKING_CONTRACT_AUDIT.md` / `scorecard_ranking_contract_audit.json` plus `python3 validate_scorecard_ranking_contract_audit.py` to check copied 30/20/100 gate floors, tier-first ranking, OP_REFINED CI-only support context, generated-at timezone provenance, and no-BAQ-as-BEL prerequisite drift across report-facing surfaces.
scorecard_audit_route.valid_use: navigation route for scorecard gate/ranking/CI-only/timezone/no-BAQ synchronization checks

upstream_refresh_order.reason: refresh settlement-audit source fingerprints after scorecard, rules, signals, or settlement-ledger byte changes
rebuild the bridge from the refreshed scorecard, right-now card, settlement audit, and CSV recompute
confirm source fingerprint parity, gate-source alignment, and non-evidence boundaries before quoting the bridge

rebuild_validation_contract.upstream_refresh_order_valid_use: reproducible rebuild order for current bridge provenance after scorecard/rules/ledger byte changes

current_operator_boundary.source_freshness_read: Right-now source as-of date 2026-07-17 is not older than bridge reference date 2026-07-17 (America/New_York); still treat the bridge as report/navigation context rather than performance evidence.
current_operator_boundary.refresh_action_boundary_read: run `./run_daily_portfolio_observation.sh` before using stale right-now instructions; a wrapper refresh can update operator surfaces, but by itself it does not settle open rows, create ROI-complete evidence, promote OP_DURABLE_K7, or support real-money discussion.
current_operator_boundary.best_action_headline: Stand down, no OP / CD target action tonight
current_operator_boundary.best_action_why: Latest ops bucket is NO TARGETS, so the quiet primary lane is explained by the race calendar, not by a rules miss. This is 4 straight no-target days at the top of the ops log.
current_operator_boundary.open_settlement_queue_read: Open settlement queue by rule: OP_DURABLE_K7 has 0 open row(s); CD_CORE_K8 has 0; other primary rules have 0; 0 open row(s) lack published rule IDs. Open rows are settlement workflow only and do not count as ROI-complete rows or OP-anchor evidence.
current_operator_boundary.primary_rule_mix_read: Primary rule mix: OP_DURABLE_K7 has 0 ROI-complete settled row(s); CD_CORE_K8 has 6. Current settled paper context is CD-only, so it should not be counted as OP-anchor forward evidence.
current_operator_boundary.latest_run_context: Latest run context: the latest live scan completed cleanly and found no qualifying races across 52 card(s) and 446 race(s).
current_operator_boundary.recommendation_context_read: Latest run context: the latest live scan completed cleanly and found no qualifying races across 52 card(s) and 446 race(s). Treat this as operator context only; use recommendation and settlement ledgers before interpreting bet readiness or forward performance.

decision_read.baq_boundary: BAQ is not BEL; dormant BEL history is not transferable to BAQ
decision_read.posture_change_gate: requires ROI-complete settled paper rows; anchor_displacement needs 30 same-candidate rows, phase8_promotion_review needs 20 shadow rows, and real_money_discussion needs 100 total settled rows; hashes and clean rerenders are provenance only
